message:
Fix edge cases in test utility functions

- SeededRng::usize_range/i64_range: Return min instead of panicking on empty range (min >= max)
- PerfMeasurement::percentile: Clamp p to [0, 100] to prevent negative cast to usize
- TestDataGenerator::content: Swap min_words/max_words if inverted

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
